title: After Five Easy Elegance (Dresses)
author: Jodie Raymond
short: This book contains patterns for several skirts, bodices, jackets and a caftan. The skirts can be made with a waistband or continued on as a dress.Bodices may be made into overblouses or added to the skirts to make a gown.These outfits can be knitted in long or short length. Combine the patterns to make your own original ensemble and way you wish.
description:
This book contains patterns for several skirts, bodices, jackets and a caftan. The skirts can be made with a waistband or continued on as a dress. Bodices may be made into overblouses or added to the skirts to make a gown. These outfits can be knitted in long or short length. Combine the patterns to make your own original ensemble and way you wish.

From Jodie:

"Not often do many of us have an opportunity, or place, to go to really "dress up" in glamorous clothes anymore.

But think about it. If nothing else, make yourself an exquisite dress to wear to the banquet at the next seminar you attend. These patterns can be as formal or as casual as you wish. Yarns, trims, embellishments, and pattern designs will change the character of each garment.

At home or out on the town, you will feel "special" and look terrific. Wearing an elegant gown for a grand evening, or entertaining at home in a luxurious casual outfit is a great feeling.

Have fun with this book and think of me when you are enjoying your special moments."

Includes:

  • Measurements and Sizing
  • Secrets for a Beautiful Skirt
  • Compensation for Figure Faults
  • Jodie's Basic Hem
  • Facings
  • Waistbands
  • Double Needle (Closed Rib) Bodices
  • Basic "mix and match" skirts, bodices and jackets
  • 30" - 40" bust / 35" - 42" hip

50 pages

Well known, long time machine knitter, Jodie Raymond traveled extensively sharing her knowledge of machine knitting. Known for her excellent finishing work and her clear instructions, Jodi authored 17 books in her long career.

Knit it Now is honored to have purchased the publishing rights her books and is including her work in tutorials and patterns.

title: A Shirt for All Seasons
author: Jodie Raymond
short: Knit-on Collar with three choices of neck openings. Easy diagram and written instructions for step-by-step knitting. "A Winning Classic
description:
Knit-on Collar with three choices of neck openings. Easy diagram and written instructions for step-by-step knitting. "A Winning Classic"

From Jodie:

"At last! Here is the Men's Shirt Book. This has been written in response to those many knitters, who have asked for instructions of the shirts I have knitted for the men in our family. However, since these are classic favorites for everyone, patterns for women and children have been included" Classic Neck Placket with Collar and Set-in Sleeves for Men, Women and Children

NOTE: Even though the photos are dated, a collared pullover, both long and short sleeves with a button placket is timeless! The book includes lots of tips and tricks, plus options to make this design your own!

Includes:

  • Detailed measuring instructions
  • Random Thoughts and Suggestions
  • Elastic Casings
  • Buttonholes
  • Collars
  • Detailed patterns for Men's, Ladies and Children's collared shirts

99 pages

Well known, long time machine knitter, Jodie Raymond traveled extensively sharing her knowledge of machine knitting.  Known for her excellent finishing work and her clear instructions, Jodi authored 17 books in her long career.

title: Let's Knit Some Slacks
author: Jodie Raymond
short:
Once you have worn properly knitted slacks, you will prefer no other kind.

This book features attractive, comfortable and wearable slacks in several styles for all occasions.
description:
From Jodie:

"Once you have worn properly knitted slacks, you will prefer no other kind. This book features attractive, comfortable and wearable slacks in several styles for all occasions. Diagrams and written instructions are included..... Once you have tried them, you'll love them!"

Includes:

  • Detailed measuring instructions
  • Instruction for perfect fit
  • 2 piece slacks
  • 4 piece slacks
  • circular leg pants
  • multiple waistband techniques

57 pages

Well known, long time machine knitter, Jodie Raymond traveled extensively sharing her knowledge of machine knitting. Known for her excellent finishing work and her clear instructions, Jodi authored 17 books in her long career.

NOTE: To make downloads easier, we have broken the book into 3 parts. If you are having trouble downloading with the Download button, use the individual links.

title: Crochet Trims for Knits
author: Jodie Raymond
short: Using a bit of crochet can add the perfect finish to a garment. Stuffed full of detailed tips, this book is sure to help you be a better knitter!
description:
Long-Time machine knitter and instructor, Jodie Raymond shares tips and techniques for using crochet with your machine knitting.
BONUS: Included in this book is an "easy swatch for machine knitters" If you struggle establishing a correct gauge in your machine knitting, try Jodie's method.

(25 pages) Ready for immediate download

From Jodie:

"In working with many knitters, it has been observed that the Crochet finishing on many of  my garments has been noticed. Lots of individuals have said they can knit, but have difficulty with crochet work. So, this book is my effort to show all of you how easy crocheting is done. Just a little practice and you're a pro .... another benefit of learning to crochet is to repair or correct major and minor disasters. There are a few tricks with crochet work to correct some unwanted happenings of a knit."

title: Signature Hats and Caps
author: Jodie Raymond
short:
The greatest asset of our knitting machine is the ease with which an unusual, personalized gift can be produced. A hat or cap with a signature or a special slogan really conveys a very special "thinking just of you" that is hard to top. This book of patterns is published to compile some different methods to knit in your unique designs.

The patterns all have step-by-step instructions. Some also have diagrams to help explain the positioning of the letters, etc. Several variations are printed of some items to enable you to use the same pattern and knit an entirely different look.
description:
Diagram style and written text instructions for several method of personalizing hats and caps that says "Especially for you!"

From Jodie:

The greatest asset of our knitting machine is the ease with which an unusual, personalized gift can be produced. A hat or cap with a signature or a special slogan really conveys a very special "thinking just of you" that is hard to top. This book of patterns is published to compile some different methods to knit in your unique designs.

The patterns all have step-by step instructions. Some also have diagrams to help explain the positioning of the letters, etc. Several variations are printed of some items to enable you to use the same pattern and knit an entirely different look.

From Sue:

The photos in this book may be dated, but the techniques presented are invaluable!
Included:
  • Lined Skull Cap
  • Easy  Double, Double Ski Hat
  • Lined Ski Hat
  • Cap with Visor
  • Pleated Beret
  • Crochet Button
  • and more!

title: Let's Knit Some Skirts
author: Jodie Raymond
short: This time it is my purpose to help you knit some beautiful skirts to wear with your lovely sweaters. Most all these skirts are made only on the main bed of the knitting machine.
description:
From Jodie:

"This time it is my purpose to help you knit some beautiful skirts to wear with your lovely sweaters. Most all these skirts are made only on the main bed of the knitting machine."

From Sue:

Even though the photos in this book are dated, the skirt shapes and knitting techniques are timeless and invaluable!

Includes:

  • Random Thoughts and Tips
  • Waistbands

title: Jodi's Favorite Demos Volume 1
author: Jodie Raymond
short: So often at seminars there are many knitters desperately trying to watch demonstrations, take intelligent notes, or tape the proceedings - only to find when they return home the tape did not record, or the notes made no sense whatsoever. And, being so busy trying to capture the material, they didn't have a chance to see all the things the instructor was showing. How frustrating. Have you been there?
description:
From Jodie:

"So often at seminars there are many knitters desperately trying to watch demonstrations, take intelligent notes, or tape the proceedings - only to find when they return home the tape did not record, or the notes made no sense whatsoever. And, being so busy trying to capture the material, they didn't have a chance to see all the things the instructor was showing. How frustrating. Have you been there?"

This book includes many detailed handouts that Jodie used over the years. Even though the photos are dated, the book is chock full of timeless information for both hand and machine knitters.

Included:

  • Bobbin Weaving (Intarsia) detailed instructions
  • Isolated and Alphabet Knitting
  • Sport Towel with Graphic DesignsBlock Alphabet Graph (vertical and horizontal)
  • International Signal Flag code graph
  • Script Alphabet and Slanted Script Graphs
  • Fingertip Towel with Graphs

56 Pages

Well known, long time machine knitter, Jodie Raymond traveled extensively sharing her knowledge of machine knitting.  Known for her excellent finishing work and her clear instructions, Jodi authored 17 books in her long career.

title: Jodi's Favorite Demos Volume 2
author: Jodie Raymond
short: For a long time the demonstrating of the Garter Bar has been one of my most popular presentations. Under this cover, you have the information given during these lectures. In addition, full illustrations are offered to assist you in mastering this necessary accessory to your knitting machine.
description:
From Jodie:
"For a long time the demonstrating of the Garter Bar has been one of my most popular presentations. Under this cover, you have the information given during these lectures. In addition, full illustrations are offered to assist you in mastering this necessary accessory to your knitting machine."
Included:

  • Using the Needle stopper Bar
  • Speed Ripping
  • Using the Garter Bar
  • Transferring Stitches
  • Holding stitches on sinker posts
  • Multiple decreasing or increasing
  • Transferring groups of stitches
  • Vertical weaving and embroidery weaving
  • The Diophantine Equation (Magic Formula) great information for both hand and machine knitters

NOTE: The Diophanitine equation is re-written and updated in the Knit it Now series of tutorials on the subject. more..

title: Let's Knit Some Blouses
author: Jodie Raymond
short: Simply Beautiful! These are patterns for juniors, misses, and ladies. Included are easy step-by-step instructions and detailed diagrams.
description:
From Jodie:

"Simply Beautiful! These are patterns for juniors, misses, and ladies. Included are easy step-by-step instructions and detailed diagrams"

From Sue:

Even though the images in this book are dated, the styles are timeless. The "U" neck top would be called a T shirt today.  The cowl neck design is so flattering, it never goes out of style. Replace the ribbing on these designs with hems or rolled edges for an easy update.

Included:

  • Cowl Neck Blouse
  • Upright Dolman
  • Lacy Sideways Dolman
  • U-neck Blouse
  • Upside down Peasant Blouse
  • Lace stitch patterns
  • Detailed instruction and comments by Jodi

title: Let's Knit Some Jackets
author: Jodie Raymond
short: Three terrific jackets, plus a jewel neckline sleevelss shell to compliment your outfits. Easy to knit, timeless in style, comfortable to wear with such effortless care. Diagrams and written instructions are included. "You will have to knit more than one!
description:
Three terrific jackets, plus a jewel neckline sleeveless shell to compliment your outfits. Easy to knit, timeless in style, comfortable to wear with such effortless care. Diagrams and written instructions are included. "You will have to knit more than one!"

NOTE: This download is large, if you are having trouble, please use the Parts 1-3 downloads individually

This is a 72 page book. The patterns are included, but the value of the book is instructional. It is chock full of detailed instruction for constructing the perfect jacket at any gauge.

From Jodie:
"Many different modes, from the most casual look to a very
dressy haute couture fashion, can be easily achieved by your
choice of different yarns and patterning. Just by varying the
length of the jacket or sleeves, substituting trims, adding or
subtracting pockets - you can completely change the character of
each of these basic jackets. With just a little thought, these
garments periodically can be easily updated to the most current
fashion, allowing you to be able to use this book over and over
again for many years. Each jacket projects it's own distinctive
image."

title: Designer Pencil Skirts for Machine Knitters
author: Sue Jalowiec
short:
Machine knitters can quickly knit gorgeous skirts that rival designer styles in both price and custom fit!

Master the tricks for professional finishes with this exciting new book.
description:
Machine knitters can quickly knit gorgeous skirts that rival designer styles in both price and custom fit! Master the tricks for professional finishes with this detailed book

Focusing on the simple shape of a pencil skirt, this exciting book (published in 2013) walks you through design ideas, construction techniques, fitting tips and professional finishing details.

The concepts can be applied to any style skirt and slacks.

Knit a simple 2 piece skirt in a weekend, or create a couture design, this book will give you the tools for success!
Interested in other skirt styles?


  • Gores
  • Shaping
  • Waistbands
  • Basic Hems
  • Designer Hems
  • Yarn Choices and Stitch Patterns
  • Slits
  • Measuring
  • Chart Your Own Skirt
  • 44 pages
  • Ready for immediate download
  
Learn more about skirts
Skirt Classroom

title: Nursery Rhyme Knits Vol 2
author: Phyllis Waterhouse
short: Collection of unisex kids sweaters featuring Nursery Rhyme motifs. For all Punchcard and Electronic Knitting Machines. Stitch patterns included
description:
Treat your kids and grandkids to very special sweaters based on their favorite nursery rhymes.
Perfect for beginners, the book is stuffed full of tips and tricks for successfully knitting these sweaters. Easy knitting, the sweater styles are crew neck with drop shoulders. They are shown with ribbed neckbands, hems and cuffs.

Phyllis Waterhouse is a long-time machine knitter, knitwear designer, instructor and author. The photography may be dated, but her books are clear, easy to follow and stuffed full of helpful tips and tricks. Her fun designs are sure to bring a smile!


Includes:
  • Kids sizes 2-14 (26" - 37" chest)
  • 11 designs
  • 45 charts
  • DAK files included
  • Full Size Punchcard images
  • 90 pages
  • READY FOR IMMEDATE DOWNLOAD

  • Ladybug, Ladybug, Fly Away Home
  • Old Mother Hubbard

title: Sailing with the Garter Carriage
author: Phyllis Waterhouse
short: Get your garter carriage sailing with these 14 unisex pullovers for Brother Electronic and punch card knitting machines. These classic nautical-themed will chase the chill for your sailor! Stitch patterns included

  • Drop Shoulder with crew neck style
  • Sized from 44" - 56" finished bust
  • Gauge 6 - 6.5 stitchs and 9-10 rows per inch

Phyllis Waterhouse was a long-time machine knitter, knitwear designer, instructor and author. The photography may be dated, but her books are clear, easy to follow and stuffed full of helpful tips and tricks.

title: A Guide to Knitting with Yarn on Cones
author: Sue Jalowiec
short: 2/24, 3/8, 5/2 .... what do those numbers mean?
description:
2/24, 3/8, 5/2 .... what do those numbers mean?

Take the mystery out of the yarn counts systems. This illustrated booklet will not only help you understand the numbers, but will show you how to compare yarns for knitting success.

title: Decorative Raglan Seams for Machine Knitters
author: Sue Jalowiec
short: Discover an unlimited number of decorative seam decreases for raglan sweaters.
description:
Discover an unlimited number of decorative seam decreases for raglan sweaters. Mix and match techniques to create plain or fancy raglan seams.

  • Simple Decreases
  • Transferred Decreases
  • Eyelet Decreases
  • Fancy Decreases
  • Seaming Tips

Written instructions, charts, diagrams and knitted samples for each technique.
22 pages

title: The ULTIMATE Machine Knit Socks (eBook)
author: Sue Jalowiec
short: This book will change the way you knit socks on the knitting machine. Use it with standard, mid or bulky machines in 4 gauges for each machine.
description:
This book will change the way you knit socks on the knitting machine. Use it with standard, mid or bulky machines in 4 gauges for each machine.

Also Included:

  • Instructions for a double bed version, knit in the round
  • Passap Duo 80 tubular version
  • Easy to follow instructions in both written and charted format
  • Detailed instructions for custom sizing

Why are these socks so special?

  • Knit Fast – Machine knitters rejoice
  • Great Fit – Gusseted heel constructed like a hand-knit sock
  • Better Wearing – Eliminates stress points of short-row heels
  • Greater Durability – Optional slip-stitch heel lasts longer
  • Comfy Cushioned Foot Bed
  • Mostly Seamless – Sew-as-you-go method for flat bed machines
  • Creative Possibilities – Any stitch pattern can be used on the instep
  • 3 Versions – Standard, mid-gauge, and bulky
  • Easy Customization for different foot sizes
  • Double Bed Circular Version – No seam in the foot
  • Creative Options – Ribbing and cuff suggestions

Revamped instructions for knitting a nearly seamless sock with traditional hand-knit heel construction.

Based on the "Swan Sock", this book includes new photography, diagrams, charts, and extensive visual instructions.

  • Parsley – Standard Gauge
  • Sage – Mid Gauge
  • Rosemary – Bulky
  • Plus double-bed version

Note: Dimensions are provided in inches only.

title: Add a Hood to Any Knitting Pattern
author: Sue Jalowiec
short: Use your favorite knitting pattern and add a decorative, useful hood.  With a little math you can make it your own!
description:
Adding a hood adds a practical designer touch to any sweater. You don't need to search for a machine knitting pattern with a hood ... create your own!

  • 8 hood styles
  • Perfect for kids and adults
  • Workbook style fill-in-the blanks format
  • 36 pages

This is a workbook, not a pattern book. It is designed to help you create your own hood with any knitting pattern

title: Picture Knits
author: Phyllis Waterhouse
short: Delightful picture knitting patterns for kids sweaters. Stitch patterns included
description: Picture knitting is a fun way to knit for kids. These patterns are designed to be easy to follow and knit.
